'''kongazaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:saboted|saboted]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-ng-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:saboted|saboted]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| kongazaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:kongazithi|kongazithi]] || [[word:kongaziji|kongaziji]] || [[word:kongazishi|kongazishi]] || [[word:kongaziki|kongaziki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:kongazuthuthu|kongazuthuthu]] || [[word:kongazujuju|kongazujuju]] || [[word:kongazushushu|kongazushushu]] || [[word:kongazukuku|kongazukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:kongazuthu|kongazuthu]] || [[word:kongazuju|kongazuju]] || [[word:kongazushu|kongazushu]] || [[word:kongazuku|kongazuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:kongazufthuf|kongazufthuf]] || [[word:kongazufjuf|kongazufjuf]] || [[word:kongazufshuf|kongazufshuf]] || [[word:kongazufkuf|kongazufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:kongazethe|kongazethe]] || [[word:kongazeje|kongazeje]] || [[word:kongazeshe|kongazeshe]] || [[word:kongazeke|kongazeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:kongazothotho|kongazothotho]] || [[word:kongazojojo|kongazojojo]] || [[word:kongazoshosho|kongazoshosho]] || [[word:kongazokoko|kongazokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:kongazotho|kongazotho]] || [[word:kongazojo|kongazojo]] || [[word:kongazosho|kongazosho]] || [[word:kongazoko|kongazoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:kongazofthof|kongazofthof]] || [[word:kongazofjof|kongazofjof]] || [[word:kongazofshof|kongazofshof]] || [[word:kongazofkof|kongazofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:kongazïfthïf|kongazïfthïf]] || [[word:kongazïfjïf|kongazïfjïf]] || [[word:kongazïfshïf|kongazïfshïf]] || [[word:kongazïfkïf|kongazïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:kongazïfthïfthïf|kongazïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:kongazïfjïfjïf|kongazïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:kongazïfshïfshïf|kongazïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:kongazïfkïfkïf|kongazïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:kongazïfthïf|kongazïfthïf]] || [[word:kongazïfjïf|kongazïfjïf]] || [[word:kongazïfshïf|kongazïfshïf]] || [[word:kongazïfkïf|kongazïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:kongazïfthïf|kongazïfthïf]] || [[word:kongazïfjïf|kongazïfjïf]] || [[word:kongazïfshïf|kongazïfshïf]] || [[word:kongazïfkïf|kongazïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:kongazæthæ|kongazæthæ]] || [[word:kongazæjæ|kongazæjæ]] || [[word:kongazæshæ|kongazæshæ]] || [[word:kongazækæ|kongazækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:kongazathatha|kongazathatha]] || [[word:kongazajaja|kongazajaja]] || [[word:kongazashasha|kongazashasha]] || [[word:kongazakaka|kongazakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:kongazatha|kongazatha]] || [[word:kongazaja|kongazaja]] || [[word:kongazasha|kongazasha]] || [[word:kongazaka|kongazaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:kongazafthaf|kongazafthaf]] || [[word:kongazafjaf|kongazafjaf]] || [[word:kongazafshaf|kongazafshaf]] || [[word:kongazafkaf|kongazafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:kongazasha|kongazasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:kongazshësha|kongazshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kongazrosha|kongazrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kongazmusha|kongazmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:kongazyasha|kongazyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokongaznkshësha|gokongaznkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokongaznkrosha|gokongaznkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokongaznkmusha|gokongaznkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokongaznkyasha|gokongaznkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:kongangazasha|kongangazasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:kongangazshësha|kongangazshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kongangazrosha|kongangazrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kongangazmusha|kongangazmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:kongangazyasha|kongangazyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokongangaznkshësha|gokongangaznkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokongangaznkrosha|gokongangaznkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokongangaznkmusha|gokongangaznkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokongangaznkyasha|gokongangaznkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:kengæzasha|kengæzasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:kengæzshësha|kengæzshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kengæzrosha|kengæzrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kengæzmusha|kengæzmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:kengæzyasha|kengæzyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokengæznkshësha|gokengæznkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokengæznkrosha|gokengæznkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokengæznkmusha|gokengæznkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokengæznkyasha|gokengæznkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:kongfazasha|kongfazasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:kongfazshësha|kongfazshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kongfazrosha|kongfazrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kongfazmusha|kongfazmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:kongfazyasha|kongfazyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokongfaznkshësha|gokongfaznkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokongfaznkrosha|gokongfaznkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokongfaznkmusha|gokongfaznkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokongfaznkyasha|gokongfaznkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|806ef69}}
